Deprecated API

Contents

  • For Removal
  • Methods
  • For Removal 
    Element Description
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsAncCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_anc_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsAudiodoTransparencyCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_audiodo_transparency_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsBatteryCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_battery_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsCalibrationCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_calibration_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsDeviceInfoCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_device_info_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsEqualizerCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_equalizer_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsProfileCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_profile_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsSpatializerCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_spatializer_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsVolumeCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_volume_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability.activate​(String)
    This function is deprecated in favour set_remote_profile and
    activate_personal_sound. This will be removed in a upcoming release.
  • Methods 
    Method Description
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsAncCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_anc_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsAudiodoTransparencyCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_audiodo_transparency_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsBatteryCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_battery_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsCalibrationCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_calibration_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsDeviceInfoCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_device_info_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsEqualizerCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_equalizer_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsProfileCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_profile_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsSpatializerCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_spatializer_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IDeviceService.supportsVolumeCapability()
    This function is deprecated in favour of is_volume_capability_supported.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability.activate​(String)
    This function is deprecated in favour set_remote_profile and
    activate_personal_sound. This will be removed in a upcoming release.
    com.audiodo.aspen.IProfileCapability.deactivate()
    Renamed to deactivate_personal_sound to make it more consistent with
    the activate counterpart.

    This method deactivates the current profile on the connected remote device.
